programme.desc: This story begins with Ariana, a renowned reporter and the adopted daughter of the respected Prawira family. programme.title: CINTA TANPA KARENA EPS 445
programme.desc: couple of lovers who are prevented from being together by their parents' approval. They are Dipta (Megantara) and Nuna (Ochi Rosdiana), and they must maintain their love in secret. Due to Nuna's mother's blockade, their love tale must overcome numerous challenges.

programme.title: MENCINTAI IPAR SENDIRI EPS 100
programme.desc: Ayuna, a beauty vlogger and model, finishes a shoot and is picked up by her younger sister, Bella. Bella takes Ayuna to a workshop to give her a surprise: Ayuna's sports car has been upgraded as a gift, since Bella is getting married before her older sister. Bella then asks Ayuna to have one last race on a deserted road as her farewell to the racing world, a request that Ayuna agrees to with a hea

programme.title: KESETIAAN JANJI CINTA EPS 43
programme.desc: Meira no longer feels happy in her marriage. Lately, Arya, her husband, constantly looks for faults in her. As a result, Meira and Arya often get into arguments. The situation reaches its peak when Arya refuses to provide for Meira anymore. He even refuses to help cover the medical expenses of Meira's mother, Siti. Arya also stops paying for Lani's college tuition, Meira's younger sister. Even tho

programme.title: 99 NAMA CINTA 25
programme.desc: Talia lives under the spotlight of cameras and the heat of celebrity news. Since her fiancé passed away, she has kept her heart tightly closed. To her, love only brings loss.Meanwhile, Kiblat is a respected young ustad—calm, courteous, and firm in his principles. programme.title: CINTA BERAKHIR BAHAGIA 16
programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. However, fate brings her together with Pasha, a respectable man from a wealthy family. Unbeknownst to them, they were actually switched at birth. What will happen to Adisty and Pasha's lives?

programme.desc: United Archives 1/1/89. A New Year's day classic as these rivals locked horns at Old Trafford. There was nothing to choose between the sides' head-to-head history, both teams had won 39 times.

programme.title: PL: United v Liverpool 92/93
programme.desc: United Archives 18/10/92. The old rivals went head-to-head looking to kickstart their campaigns after slow starts.

programme.title: PL: United v Liverpool 96/97
programme.desc: United Archives 12/10/96. United and Liverpool went head to head for the first time since Eric Cantona had inspired the Reds to FA Cup glory at the Merseysiders' expense.

programme.title: PL: United v Liverpool 02/03
programme.desc: United Archives 5/4/03. In a tight run-in for the title, a win for United would take them level with leaders Arsenal with six games to play.

programme.title: PL: United v Liverpool 07/08

programme.title: TVP@TTV B. Melayu Ting. 3 Ep01
programme.desc: Tajuk sajak Kijang Yang Lelah ini membincangkan tentang maksud sajak serta komponen sastera yang terkandung dalam sajak ini dan tentang tema, persoalan, gaya bahasa, nilai dan pengajaran.

programme.title: TVP@TTV B. Melayu Ting. 4 Ep02
programme.desc: Murid diperdengarkan dendangan syair untuk membangkitkan keseronokan dan menarik minat. Isi pelajaran menyentuh aspek maksud syair mengikut rangkap, tema, persoalan, gaya bahasa, nilai dan pengajaran.

programme.title: TVP@TTV B. Melayu Ting. 4 Ep03
programme.desc: Tajuk ini membincangkan subtopik jenis-jenis perkataan (morfologi). Pentaksiran berbentuk formatif juga diberikan setelah selesai satu-satu subtopik yang dibincangkan.

programme.title: TVP@TTV B. Melayu Ting. 5
programme.desc: Peribahasa dalam episod ini adalah yang terdapat dalam buku teks tingkatan 4 dan 5. Tujuan pdpc ini adalah untuk memberi pendedahan tentang bentuk soalan yang berkaitan dengan peribahasa.

programme.title: TVP@TTV B. Melayu Ting. 1 Ep01
programme.desc: Tajuk Sajak Kita Umpama Sehelai Daun mendedahkan pemahaman terhadap sajak dan memandu murid-murid untuk mengapreasiasi karya sajak tingkatan satu.

programme.title: TVP@TTV B. Melayu Ting. 1 Ep02
programme.desc: Tajuk Pantun Dua Kerat (Nasihat) ini akan membincangkan tentang maksud setiap rangkap dan menerangkan secara terperinci tentang tema, persoalan, nilai dan pengajaran.

programme.title: TVP@TTV B. Melayu Ting. 2 Ep01
programme.desc: Sajak ini memperlihatkan bait-bait puisi yang menyentuh tentang wanita yang mana penceritaan tentang bunga mawar adalah untuk memberi perlambangan tentang ketinggian maruah seorang wanita.

programme.title: TVP@TTV B. Melayu Ting. 2 Ep02
programme.desc: Topik ini membincangkan sajak pada sekuntum mawar.

programme.desc: Sekar (Janna LIDA) is disappointed with his father, like it or not, he has to help his mother earn a living to meet his daily needs. Sekar faced trials after trials with patience, until finally Sekar and his mother tried to raise honey for their survival.

programme.desc: Zahwa (Jennifer Eve) is stressed and annoyed with her boss, Adit (Ridho Illahi), who asks her to sell multiple apartment units in a single day as a salesperson. However, that annoyance slowly turns into the seeds of love.

programme.title: Keliatan Banget Nyenggol Hati King Dosen
programme.desc: As Galang passed by, a man wearing the same jacket ran past him. Moments later, the man came chasing after Erin's purse snatcher. Galang was nearly beaten by the mob. programme.title: STAND UP COMEDY ACADEMY 4
programme.desc: Stand Up Comedy Academy (Season 4) is the fourth installment of the popular comedian talent search competition aired on Indosiar. This season features a refreshed lineup of hosts, bringing together the dynamic chemistry of Ayu Dewi, Gilang Dirga, Arie Kriting, Andhika Pratama, and Uus to lead the hunt for Indonesia’s next comedy star.

programme.title: Mantanan Sama Gue Mantenan Sama Dia, Chuaks
programme.desc: Tasya and Suji met in the park when they were both dumped by their boyfriends at the same time. The two became closer when Tasya asked Suji to pretend to be her boyfriend so that her ex would be jealous of her. Because they spent so much time together, their relationship became serious.

programme.title: Salfok Sama Neng Domba Satu Ini
programme.desc: Virza's restaurant went bankrupt because his regular sheep supplier was late in delivering meat for his restaurant. Sifa, the owner of the sheep farm, had to accept compensation by selling Virza's small shop. The two became closer, and Virza secretly developed feelings for Sifa.

programme.title: STAND UP COMEDY ACADEMY 4
programme.desc: Stand Up Comedy Academy (Season 4) is the fourth installment of the popular comedian talent search competition aired on Indosiar. programme.title: Apapun Masalah Cintamu, Damkar Solusinya
programme.desc: Nuning (Ika Diharjo) becomes a firefighter, pursuing her late father's dream. On her way to work, she encounters Didan, who nearly hits a playing child and runs away. Didan is hit by the rock, his head getting stuck in the fence, and he ends up meeting Nuning again.

programme.title: STAND UP COMEDY ACADEMY 4
programme.desc: Stand Up Comedy Academy (Season 4) is the fourth installment of the popular comedian talent search competition aired on Indosiar. This season features a refreshed lineup of hosts, bringing together the dynamic chemistry of Ayu Dewi, Gilang Dirga, Arie Kriting, Andhika Pratama, and Uus to lead the hunt for Indonesia’s next comedy star.

programme.title: Ibaratnya Gini Wir, Lu Digoreng Tapi Gamon
programme.desc: Bella wants to learn entrepreneurship, then she partners with a handsome guy, who she finds incredibly annoying. Bella then harbors a grudge against him, making him afraid to have another relationship with her. But then the guy disguises himself as a blind man. He then disguises himself as a minibus driver and takes Bella home

programme.title: DISEBELAH ADA SURGA
programme.desc: The story of three young men named Andhika, Gading, and Uus. All three of them lack spiritual depth. They have spent their youth living carefree lives, indulging in pleasure without a care in the world about their future.

programme.title: Garam dan Madu Aku Biro Kamu Mau?
programme.desc: A beautiful girl named Fuji (Larasati Nugroho), the owner of a matchmaking agency. One day, Fuji gets a client, a barbershop owner's son named Ivan (Arya Vasco). From there, Ivan is asked by his mother to find a partner. Until finally, Ivan, the barbershop owner, says, "Why don't you be my partner, and I introduce you to my mother?"

programme.title: Mahkotamu Ketinggalan di DC Cakung Queen
programme.desc: Keyla was shocked to meet Roy at the market. Roy accidentally saw Keyla, Keyla immediately ran into the market and accidentally hit Yudi in the market.
